problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: BidShield: Graph-Based Bid Ring Detection and Fraud Prevention in Government Procurement
summary: Design a technical platform to understand tenders, bidders, evaluate eligibility, and produce explainable evaluation reports using Graph Neural Networks (GNN) and statistical bid analysis.
constraints_addressed: Collusive bidding rings in real time
